title: Deal Pipeline
description: Deal count and value by stage

panels.title: Deals by Stage
panels.sql: SELECT "Stage", COUNT(*) as count FROM v_deal GROUP BY "Stage" ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Revenue by Stage
panels.sql: SELECT "Stage", SUM("Amount"::NUMERIC) as total FROM v_deal GROUP BY "Stage" ORDER BY total DESC

panels.title: Deals Over Time
panels.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM v_deal GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
